## Test Class: TeleServiceTest

### Setup

```kotlin
package org.tele.flutter_dialer

import android.content.Intent
import android.net.Uri
import android.telecom.Call
import android.util.Log
import io.mockk.*
import org.junit.Before
import org.junit.Test
import org.junit.Assert.*
import org.robolectric.RobolectricTestRunner
import org.robolectric.annotation.Config
import org.robolectric.shadows.ShadowLog
import org.junit.runner.RunWith

@RunWith(RobolectricTestRunner::class)
@Config(sdk = [23])
class TeleServiceTest {

    private lateinit var service: TeleService
    private lateinit var mockCall: Call
    private lateinit var mockDetails: Call.Details
    private lateinit var mockHandle: Uri

    @Before
    fun setUp() {
        service = TeleService()
        mockCall = mockk()
        mockDetails = mockk()
        mockHandle = mockk()

        every { mockCall.details } returns mockDetails
        every { mockDetails.handle } returns mockHandle
        every { mockHandle.schemeSpecificPart } returns "1234567890"

        // Setup Robolectric logging
        ShadowLog.stream = System.out
    }
}
```

---

## Test Implementations

### Service Lifecycle Tests

```kotlin
@Test
fun onCreate_logsCreation() {
    // Arrange
    val expectedLog = "TeleService created"

    // Act
    service.onCreate()

    // Assert
    val logs = ShadowLog.getLogsForTag("TeleService")
    assertTrue(logs.any { it.msg == expectedLog && it.type == Log.DEBUG })
}

@Test
fun onDestroy_logsDestruction() {
    // Arrange
    service.onCreate()
    val expectedLog = "TeleService destroyed"

    // Act
    service.onDestroy()

    // Assert
    val logs = ShadowLog.getLogsForTag("TeleService")
    assertTrue(logs.any { it.msg == expectedLog && it.type == Log.DEBUG })
}

@Test
fun onBind_returnsSuperValue() {
    // Arrange
    val mockIntent = mockk<Intent>()

    // Act
    val result = service.onBind(mockIntent)

    // Assert
    // InCallService.onBind() returns null by default
    assertNull(result)
}
```

---

### Call Lifecycle Tests

```kotlin
@Test
fun onCallAdded_logsCallHandle() {
    // Arrange
    val expectedLog = "Call added: 1234567890"

    // Act
    service.onCallAdded(mockCall)

    // Assert
    val logs = ShadowLog.getLogsForTag("TeleService")
    assertTrue(logs.any { it.msg == expectedLog && it.type == Log.DEBUG })
}

@Test
fun onCallAdded_registersCallback() {
    // Arrange
    val callbackCaptor = slot<Call.Callback>()
    every { mockCall.registerCallback(capture(callbackCaptor)) } answers { }

    // Act
    service.onCallAdded(mockCall)

    // Assert
    verify { mockCall.registerCallback(any()) }
    assertNotNull(callbackCaptor.captured)
}

@Test
fun onCallRemoved_logsRemoval() {
    // Arrange
    val expectedLog = "Call removed"

    // Act
    service.onCallRemoved(mockCall)

    // Assert
    val logs = ShadowLog.getLogsForTag("TeleService")
    assertTrue(logs.any { it.msg == expectedLog && it.type == Log.DEBUG })
}
```

---

### Call.Callback Tests

```kotlin
@Test
fun callback_onStateChanged_logsState() {
    // Arrange
    val callbackCaptor = slot<Call.Callback>()
    every { mockCall.registerCallback(capture(callbackCaptor)) } answers { }
    service.onCallAdded(mockCall)

    // Act
    callbackCaptor.captured.onStateChanged(mockCall, Call.STATE_CONNECTED)

    // Assert
    val logs = ShadowLog.getLogsForTag("TeleService")
    assertTrue(logs.any { 
        it.msg == "Call state changed: ${Call.STATE_CONNECTED}" && 
        it.type == Log.DEBUG 
    })
}

@Test
fun callback_onCallDestroyed_logsDestruction() {
    // Arrange
    val callbackCaptor = slot<Call.Callback>()
    every { mockCall.registerCallback(capture(callbackCaptor)) } answers { }
    service.onCallAdded(mockCall)

    // Act
    callbackCaptor.captured.onCallDestroyed(mockCall)

    // Assert
    val logs = ShadowLog.getLogsForTag("TeleService")
    assertTrue(logs.any { 
        it.msg == "Call destroyed" && 
        it.type == Log.DEBUG 
    })
}
```

---

### State Transition Tests

```kotlin
@Test
fun allCallStates_areLogged() {
    // Arrange
    val states = listOf(
        Call.STATE_CONNECTING,
        Call.STATE_CONNECTED,
        Call.STATE_DISCONNECTING,
        Call.STATE_DISCONNECTED,
        Call.STATE_SELECT_PHONE_ACCOUNT,
        Call.STATE_RINGING,
        Call.STATE_ACTIVE,
        Call.STATE_HOLDING
    )

    val callbackCaptor = slot<Call.Callback>()
    every { mockCall.registerCallback(capture(callbackCaptor)) } answers { }
    service.onCallAdded(mockCall)

    // Act & Assert
    states.forEach { state ->
        ShadowLog.clear()
        callbackCaptor.captured.onStateChanged(mockCall, state)

        val logs = ShadowLog.getLogsForTag("TeleService")
        assertTrue(
            "State $state should be logged",
            logs.any { it.msg == "Call state changed: $state" }
        )
    }
}

@Test
fun callLifecycle_completeSequence_logsAllEvents() {
    // Arrange
    val callbackCaptor = slot<Call.Callback>()
    every { mockCall.registerCallback(capture(callbackCaptor)) } answers { }

    // Act: Simulate complete call lifecycle
    service.onCreate()
    service.onCallAdded(mockCall)
    callbackCaptor.captured.onStateChanged(mockCall, Call.STATE_CONNECTING)
    callbackCaptor.captured.onStateChanged(mockCall, Call.STATE_CONNECTED)
    callbackCaptor.captured.onStateChanged(mockCall, Call.STATE_ACTIVE)
    service.onCallRemoved(mockCall)
    callbackCaptor.captured.onCallDestroyed(mockCall)
    service.onDestroy()

    // Assert
    val logs = ShadowLog.getLogsForTag("TeleService")
    val messages = logs.map { it.msg }

    assertTrue("Service creation logged", messages.contains("TeleService created"))
    assertTrue("Call added logged", messages.any { it.startsWith("Call added") })
    assertTrue("State changes logged", messages.any { it.startsWith("Call state changed") })
    assertTrue("Call removed logged", messages.contains("Call removed"))
    assertTrue("Call destroyed logged", messages.contains("Call destroyed"))
    assertTrue("Service destruction logged", messages.contains("TeleService destroyed"))
}
```

---

## Running Tests

### Unit Tests

```bash
cd android
./gradlew test

# With coverage
./gradlew test jacocoTestReport

# View coverage report
open build/reports/jacoco/jacocoTestReport/html/index.html
```

### Integration Tests

```bash
cd android
./gradlew connectedAndroidTest
```

## Dependencies (build.gradle)

```gradle
dependencies {
    testImplementation 'junit:junit:4.13.2'
    testImplementation 'io.mockk:mockk:1.13.4'
    testImplementation 'org.robolectric:robolectric:4.9'
    testImplementation 'androidx.test:core:1.5.0'
    
    androidTestImplementation 'androidx.test:runner:1.5.2'
    androidTestImplementation 'androidx.test:rules:1.5.0'
    androidTestImplementation 'androidx.test.espresso:espresso-core:3.5.1'
}
```
